title: corallocarpus ellipticus
intro: Corallocarpus ellipticus, also known as the 'clock vine' or 'dwarf clock vine', is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Corallocarpus ellipticus is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
